headers.summary: Allocation, conversion, integer mathematics, random numbers, and process control.
Memory copy and comparison plus C string operations.
Standard input/output, formatted I/O, and file I/O.
Mathematical functions for f16, f32, f64, and f128.
ASCII character classification and case conversion.
